aeo_readiness.summary: The website has basic AEO elements in place, such as structured data and service-focused content, but lacks depth in content, reviews, and local SEO optimization.
quick_wins: Implement a review generation strategy to build Google reviews and improve trust signals.
Expand service pages with more detailed content and target relevant long-tail keywords.
Optimize meta tags and headers with location-specific keywords to improve local search visibility.

gbp_analysis.summary: The GBP (Google Business Profile) is not fully optimized. While the website has local service information, the lack of reviews and incomplete GBP information is a critical issue.
critical_issues: No Google reviews, which impacts trust and local search ranking.
Incomplete or missing GBP information, such as business hours, photos, and services.
Lack of regular updates and engagement on the GBP.

nap_citations.summary: The business has consistent NAP (Name, Address, Phone Number) information on the website, but lacks widespread citations across local directories and platforms.
action_items: Create and verify listings on major local directories such as Yelp, Bing Places, and Apple Maps.
Ensure NAP consistency across all online platforms and citations.
Leverage local business associations and industry-specific directories for additional citations.

schema_gaps: No FAQPage schema to address common customer queries.
Missing Review schema to highlight customer testimonials and feedback.
No LocalBusiness schema with detailed service area and service type specifications.

ai_visibility_gap.primary_gap: Lack of localized and detailed content targeting specific service areas and customer needs.
ai_visibility_gap.invisible_for: Users searching for detailed plumbing or HVAC services in specific North Atlanta neighborhoods.
ai_visibility_gap.low_hanging_fruit: Enhance service pages with location-specific keywords and detailed content.
ai_visibility_gap.authority_opportunity: Develop a blog or resource section with expert advice on plumbing and HVAC topics to build authority and improve search visibility.

page_title: Aaron Services: Plumbing, Heating, Cooling – Older Homes Experts Serving Suwanee, GA and Nearby Areas
